{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20764_1
|class_id=20764
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20764_2
|fame=17
|art=13
|fth=31
|civ=16
|tech=13
|ss1=Glory Extractor:<br>> Refine Speedup Conversion Cap +200%
|ss2=Glory Extractor:<br>> Refine Speedup Conversion Cap +500%
|ss3=Glory Extractor:<br>> Refine Speedup Conversion Cap +800%
|ss4=Glory Extractor:<br>> Refine Speedup Conversion Cap +800%
|ss7=Glory Extractor:<br>> Refine Speedup Conversion Cap +800%<br> (Awakened)
}}
